context: Tests whether the agent follows the CarPlay navigation setup guidance for entitlements, scene lifecycle, root template setup, map rendering boundaries, and simulator/hardware testing.

checklist.name: Navigation entitlement
checklist.description: Uses the navigation CarPlay entitlement and states that Apple must grant the category-specific managed capability/provisioning support.

checklist.name: Scene manifest
checklist.description: Declares a CarPlay scene in UIApplicationSceneManifest using the CarPlay template scene role, scene class, and scene delegate class.

checklist.name: Navigation delegate
checklist.description: Uses the navigation scene delegate connection method that receives both CPInterfaceController and CPWindow.

checklist.name: Reference retention
checklist.description: Stores CPInterfaceController and CPWindow references for the active CarPlay session and clears them on disconnect.

checklist.name: Map root
checklist.description: Sets CPMapTemplate as the root template for the navigation app.

checklist.name: Window boundary
checklist.description: Limits CPWindow root view controller content to map rendering and keeps controls, alerts, overlays, and navigation UI in CarPlay templates.

checklist.name: Guidance APIs
checklist.description: Uses CarPlay route preview/navigation session concepts such as CPTrip, CPRouteChoice, CPNavigationSession, CPManeuver, or CPTravelEstimates.

checklist.name: Simulator matrix
checklist.description: Includes multiple CarPlay Simulator display configurations beyond the default window, including high-resolution or portrait coverage.

checklist.name: Hardware limits
checklist.description: States that Simulator is not enough for locked-iPhone, Siri, audio coexistence, or physical input hardware behavior.

checklist.name: No custom chrome
checklist.description: Does not recommend custom UIKit/SwiftUI controls, banners, or overlays in the CPWindow map view.
